vocabulary.example: 抽象艺术不直接描绘现实，而是通过形状和色彩传达情感。
vocabulary.translation: Abstract art does not depict reality directly, but conveys emotion through shapes and colors.
vocabulary.example_pinyin: chōu xiàng yì shù bù zhí jiē miáo huì xiàn shí ér shì tōng guò xíng zhuàng hé sè cǎi chuán dá qíng gǎn

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: abstract
mini_exercises.question_chinese: ___艺术不直接描绘现实，而是通过形状和色彩传达情感。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: ___艺术不直接描绘现实，而是通过形状和色彩传达情感。
mini_exercises.question_english: Abstract art does not depict reality directly, but conveys emotion through shapes and colors.

vocabulary.example: 与抽象艺术相对，具体艺术描绘真实可见的形象。
vocabulary.translation: In contrast to abstract art, representational art depicts real, visible forms.
vocabulary.example_pinyin: yǔ chōu xiàng yì shù xiāng duì jù tǐ yì shù miáo huì zhēn shí kě jiàn de xíng xiàng

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: concrete, specific
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 与抽象艺术相对，___艺术描绘真实可见的形象。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 与抽象艺术相对，___艺术描绘真实可见的形象。
mini_exercises.question_english: In contrast to abstract art, representational art depicts real, visible forms.

vocabulary.example: 艺术的形式多种多样，从绘画到雕塑，各有其美。
vocabulary.translation: Art takes many forms — from painting to sculpture, each has its own beauty.
vocabulary.example_pinyin: yì shù de xíng shì duō zhǒng duō yàng cóng huì huà dào diāo sù gè yǒu qí měi

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: form, style
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 艺术的___多种多样，从绘画到雕塑，各有其美。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 艺术的___多种多样，从绘画到雕塑，各有其美。
mini_exercises.question_english: Art takes many forms — from painting to sculpture, each has its own beauty.

vocabulary.example: 每个人对同一件艺术品的解读都不同，这正是艺术的魅力所在。
vocabulary.translation: Each person's interpretation of the same work of art is different — this is precisely where the charm of art lies.
vocabulary.example_pinyin: měi gè rén duì tóng yī jiàn yì shù pǐn de jiě dú dōu bù tóng zhè zhèng shì yì shù de mèi lì suǒ zài

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: Interpretation / To interpret / To read (meaning)
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 每个人对同一件艺术品的___都不同，这正是艺术的魅力所在。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 每个人对同一件艺术品的___都不同，这正是艺术的魅力所在。
mini_exercises.question_english: Each person's interpretation of the same work of art is different — this is precisely where the charm of art lies.

mini_exercises.question: Which word means 'Interpretation / To interpret / To read (meaning)'?

vocabulary.example: 不同艺术家的创作理念各不相同，正是这种差异造就了艺术的多样性。
vocabulary.translation: The creative concepts of different artists vary greatly, and it is precisely this difference that creates art's diversity.
vocabulary.example_pinyin: bù tóng yì shù jiā de chuàng zuò lǐ niàn gè bù xiāng tóng zhèng shì zhè zhǒng chà yì zào jiù le yì shù de duō yàng xìng

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: Concept / Philosophy / Guiding idea
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 不同艺术家的创作___各不相同，正是这种差异造就了艺术的多样性。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 不同艺术家的创作___各不相同，正是这种差异造就了艺术的多样性。
mini_exercises.question_english: The creative concepts of different artists vary greatly, and it is precisely this difference that creates art's diversity.

mini_exercises.question: Which word means 'Concept / Philosophy / Guiding idea'?

vocabulary.example: 街头涂鸦是一种充满想象力的艺术形式，能够传达艺术家独特的审美理念。
vocabulary.translation: Street graffiti is an imaginative art form that can convey the artist's unique aesthetic concepts.

mini_exercises.question_english: Street graffiti is an imaginative art form that can convey the artist's unique aesthetic concepts.

mini_exercises.question: Which word means 'Graffiti / To doodle / Street art'?

vocabulary.english: Blank space / Empty space / White space
vocabulary.example: 画面中的空白并非无意义，而是艺术家刻意留下的想象空间。
vocabulary.translation: The blank space in a painting is not meaningless — it is the imaginative space deliberately left by the artist.
vocabulary.example_pinyin: huà miàn zhōng de kòng bái bìng fēi wú yì yì ér shì yì shù jiā kè yì liú xià de xiǎng xiàng kōng jiān

mini_exercises.question: What does 空白 mean?
mini_exercises.correct: Blank space / Empty space / White space
options: Blank space / Empty space / White space

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: Blank space / Empty space / White space
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 画面中的___并非无意义，而是艺术家刻意留下的想象空间。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 画面中的___并非无意义，而是艺术家刻意留下的想象空间。
mini_exercises.question_english: The blank space in a painting is not meaningless — it is the imaginative space deliberately left by the artist.

mini_exercises.question: Which word means 'Blank space / Empty space / White space'?

vocabulary.example: 这幅画用了大量暖色调，给人温暖和有活力的感受。
vocabulary.translation: This painting uses a lot of warm colors, giving a sense of warmth and vitality.
vocabulary.example_pinyin: zhè fú huà yòng le dà liàng nuǎn sè diào gěi rén wēn nuǎn huo yǒu huó lì de gǎn shòu

mini_exercises.question: What does 色彩 mean?
options: Blank space / Empty space / White space

vocabulary.example: 简洁的线条往往能传达出丰富的情感内容。
vocabulary.translation: Simple lines can often convey rich emotional content.
vocabulary.example_pinyin: jiǎn jié de xiàn tiáo wǎng wǎng néng chuán dá chū fēng fù de qíng gǎn nèi róng

mini_exercises.question: What does 线条 mean?
options: Blank space / Empty space / White space

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: line, stroke
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 简洁的___往往能传达出丰富的情感内容。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 简洁的___往往能传达出丰富的情感内容。
mini_exercises.question_english: Simple lines can often convey rich emotional content.

vocabulary.example: 丰富的想象力是艺术创作的核心，能让作品超越现实的限制。
vocabulary.translation: Rich imagination is the core of artistic creation, allowing works to transcend the limitations of reality.
vocabulary.example_pinyin: fēng fù de xiǎng xiàng lì shì yì shù chuàng zuò de hé xīn néng ràng zuò pǐn chāo yuè xiàn shí de xiàn zhì

mini_exercises.question_english: Artistic creation requires imagination as well as technique.

vocabulary.example: 不同文化背景的人，审美观念也会有所不同。
vocabulary.translation: People from different cultural backgrounds may have different aesthetic concepts.
vocabulary.example_pinyin: bù tóng wén huà bèi jǐng de rén shěn měi guān niàn yě huì yǒu suǒ bù tóng

mini_exercises.question: What does 审美 mean?
options: Blank space / Empty space / White space

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: aesthetic sense, aesthetics
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 不同文化背景的人，___观念也会有所不同。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 不同文化背景的人，___观念也会有所不同。
mini_exercises.question_english: People from different cultural backgrounds may have different aesthetic concepts.

vocabulary.example: 抽象艺术的意义往往由观者自己来赋予。
vocabulary.translation: The meaning of abstract art is often assigned by the viewer themselves.
vocabulary.example_pinyin: chōu xiàng yì shù de yì yì wǎng wǎng yóu guān zhě zì jǐ lái fù yǔ

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: meaning, significance
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 抽象艺术的___往往由观者自己来赋予。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 抽象艺术的___往往由观者自己来赋予。
mini_exercises.question_english: The meaning of abstract art is often assigned by the viewer themselves.

vocabulary.example: 白色在西方文化中象征纯洁，在东亚文化中则常与哀悼相关。
vocabulary.translation: White symbolizes purity in Western culture, but in East Asian culture it is often associated with mourning.
vocabulary.example_pinyin: bái sè zài xī fāng wén huà zhōng xiàng zhēng chún jié zài dōng yà wén huà zhōng zé cháng yǔ āi dào xiāng guān

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: to symbolize, symbol
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 白色在西方文化中___纯洁，在东亚文化中则常与哀悼相关。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 白色在西方文化中___纯洁，在东亚文化中则常与哀悼相关。
mini_exercises.question_english: White symbolizes purity in Western culture, but in East Asian culture it is often associated with mourning.

vocabulary.example: 掌握一定的绘画技巧，有助于更自由地表达自己的想象力和审美理念。
vocabulary.translation: Mastering certain painting techniques helps one more freely express their imagination and aesthetic concepts.
vocabulary.example_pinyin: zhǎng wò yí dìng de huì huà jì qiǎo yǒu zhù yú gèng zì yóu dì biǎo dá zì jǐ de xiǎng xiàng lì hé shěn měi lǐ niàn

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: Technique / Skill / Craft
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 艺术创作需要想象力，也需要___。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 艺术创作需要想象力，也需要___。
mini_exercises.question_english: Artistic creation requires imagination as well as technique.

vocabulary.example: 艺术欣赏带有很强的主观性，没有绝对的对错之分。
vocabulary.translation: Art appreciation is highly subjective — there is no absolute right or wrong.
vocabulary.example_pinyin: yì shù xīn shǎng dài yǒu hěn qiáng de zhǔ guān xìng méi yǒu jué duì de duì cuò zhī fēn

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: subjective
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 艺术欣赏带有很强的___性，没有绝对的对错之分。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 艺术欣赏带有很强的___性，没有绝对的对错之分。
mini_exercises.question_english: Art appreciation is highly subjective — there is no absolute right or wrong.

key_sentences.chinese: 美的标准在于个人的感受，而不是某种固定的形式。
key_sentences.pinyin: Měi de biāo zhǔn zài yú gè rén de gǎn shòu, ér bú shì mǒu zhǒng gù dìng de xíng shì.
key_sentences.english: The standard of beauty lies in personal feeling, not in some fixed form.

key_sentences.chinese: 所谓抽象艺术，不过是另一种表达内心世界的方式。
key_sentences.pinyin: Suǒ wèi chōu xiàng yì shù, bú guò shì lìng yī zhǒng biǎo dá nèi xīn shì jiè de fāng shì.
key_sentences.english: The so-called abstract art is only another way of expressing one's inner world.

key_sentences.chinese: 这幅画看上去很简单，其中却蕴含了艺术家多年的情感积淀。
key_sentences.pinyin: Zhè fú huà kàn shàng qù hěn jiǎn dān, qí zhōng què yùn hán le yì shù jiā duō nián de qíng gǎn jī diàn.
key_sentences.english: This painting looks simple, but it contains the artist's years of emotional accumulation.

key_sentences.chinese: 审美的核心在于感受，而不在于分析。
key_sentences.pinyin: Shěn měi de hé xīn zài yú gǎn shòu, ér bú zài yú fēn xī.
key_sentences.english: The core of aesthetics lies in feeling, not in analysis.

key_sentences.chinese: 所谓美，不过是每个人内心世界的不同投射。
key_sentences.pinyin: Suǒ wèi měi, bú guò shì měi gè rén nèi xīn shì jiè de bù tóng tóu shè.
key_sentences.english: The so-called beauty is only the different projection of each person's inner world.

key_sentences.chinese: 不过，欣赏抽象艺术确实需要一些开放的心态和想象力。
key_sentences.pinyin: Bú guò, xīn shǎng chōu xiàng yì shù quē shí xū yào yī xiē kāi fàng de xīn tài hé xiǎng xiàng lì.
key_sentences.english: However, appreciating abstract art does require an open mindset and imagination.

grammar_points.meaning: Lies in / depends on / is in
grammar_points.explanation: 在于 indicates where the essence, key, or nature of something resides. Structure: [Subject] + 在于 + [noun phrase / verb phrase]. It is used to define the true nature, purpose, or importance of something. Similar to 关键在于 but more versatile — it can follow any noun subject.

examples.chinese: 成功不在于天赋，而在于努力。
examples.pinyin: Chéng gōng bù zài yú tiān fù，ér zài yú nǔ lì.
examples.english: Success does not lie in talent, but in hard work.

examples.chinese: 艺术的意义在于触动人的内心。
examples.pinyin: Yì shù de yì yì zài yú chù dòng rén de nèi xīn.
examples.english: The meaning of art lies in touching people's hearts.

exercises.question: Fill in: 教育的目的 ___ 培养学生的独立思考能力。
Choose the correct sentence using 在于:
choices: 幸福不在于拥有多少，而在于珍惜所拥有的。
在于他很努力，所以成功了。
他在于工作，没时间休息。

exercises.question: 在于 is used to say:
choices: Where the essence or key of something lies

exercises.question: What is the difference between 在于 and 关键在于?
choices: 关键在于 emphasizes it is the KEY factor; 在于 is more neutral
在于 can only follow verbs; 关键在于 can follow nouns
在于 is informal; 关键在于 is formal

exercises.question: Complete: 艺术的价值___触动人心，而不在于技法的复杂。

mini_exercises.question: 在于 + VP/NP means...
mini_exercises.correct: The essential nature, key, or purpose of something 'lies in' or 'depends on' what follows — it defines where the true importance resides
options: The essential nature, key, or purpose of something 'lies in' or 'depends on' what follows — it defines where the true importance resides
A result or consequence that follows from the preceding action
A time sequence: once this happens, that will follow
A preference for one option over another

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: The charm of abstract art lies in the fact that each viewer can have a different interpretation.
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 抽象艺术的魅力___每个观者都能有不同的解读。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 抽象艺术的魅力___每个观者都能有不同的解读。
mini_exercises.question_english: The charm of abstract art lies in the fact that each viewer can have a different interpretation.

mini_exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 在于?
mini_exercises.correct: 艺术创作的核心在于真实表达创作者的内心感受。
options: 艺术创作的核心在于真实表达创作者的内心感受。
在于艺术创作的核心，真实表达创作者的内心感受。
艺术创作的核心真实表达在于创作者的内心感受。
艺术创作在于的核心，真实表达创作者的内心感受。
option_pinyin: yì shù chuàng zuò de hé xīn zài yú zhēn shí biǎo dá chuàng zuò zhě de nèi xīn gǎn shòu
zài yú yì shù chuàng zuò de hé xīn zhēn shí biǎo dá chuàng zuò zhě de nèi xīn gǎn shòu
yì shù chuàng zuò de hé xīn zhēn shí biǎo dá zài yú chuàng zuò zhě de nèi xīn gǎn shòu
yì shù chuàng zuò zài yú de hé xīn zhēn shí biǎo dá chuàng zuò zhě de nèi xīn gǎn shòu

grammar_points.explanation: 所谓 means 'the so-called' and introduces a term or concept that is about to be defined, explained, questioned, or critiqued. Structure: 所谓 + [term/concept] + [definition / skeptical comment]. It can express genuine definition, skepticism, or irony depending on context.

examples.chinese: 所谓成功，因人而异，很难有一个统一的定义。
examples.pinyin: Suǒ wèi chéng gōng，yīn rén ér yì，hěn nán yǒu yī gè tǒng yī de dìng yì.
examples.english: The so-called success varies from person to person and is hard to define uniformly.

examples.chinese: 他所谓的帮助，其实给我带来了更多麻烦。
examples.pinyin: Tā suǒ wèi de bāng zhù，qí shí gěi wǒ dài lái le gèng duō má fan.
examples.english: His so-called help actually brought me more trouble.

exercises.question: 所谓 is used to:
choices: Introduce a term that is about to be defined or questioned

exercises.question: Which sentence uses 所谓 correctly?
choices: 所谓友谊，就是在困难时能互相帮助。
所谓他去了北京，因此很开心。
他所谓因为，很努力去了。

exercises.question: In the sentence '所谓的专家，其实什么都不懂', 所谓 expresses:
Fill in: ___美，其实均因人而异，没有统一标准。
所谓 is closest in meaning to:

mini_exercises.question: 所谓 + N is used to...
mini_exercises.correct: Introduce a term or concept that is about to be defined or examined — 'the so-called'; can also express skepticism or a need to question the term
options: Introduce a term or concept that is about to be defined or examined — 'the so-called'; can also express skepticism or a need to question the term
Express surprise or disbelief about an unexpected event
Indicate that a result follows from a preceding action
Highlight the most important condition for achieving a result

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: The so-called 'aesthetics' actually varies from person to person — there is no absolute standard.
mini_exercises.question_chinese: ___"审美"，其实因人而异，没有绝对的标准。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: ___"审美"，其实因人而异，没有绝对的标准。
mini_exercises.question_english: The so-called 'aesthetics' actually varies from person to person — there is no absolute standard.

mini_exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 所谓?
mini_exercises.correct: 所谓风格，不过是艺术家内心世界的外在表达。
options: 所谓风格，不过是艺术家内心世界的外在表达。
风格所谓，不过是艺术家内心世界的外在表达。
风格，不过是所谓艺术家内心世界的外在表达。
不过是所谓，风格艺术家内心世界的外在表达。
option_pinyin: suǒ wèi fēng gé bù guò shì yì shù jiā nèi xīn shì jiè de wài zài biǎo dá
fēng gé suǒ wèi bù guò shì yì shù jiā nèi xīn shì jiè de wài zài biǎo dá
fēng gé bù guò shì suǒ wèi yì shù jiā nèi xīn shì jiè de wài zài biǎo dá
bù guò shì suǒ wèi fēng gé yì shù jiā nèi xīn shì jiè de wài zài biǎo dá

grammar_points.explanation: 不过 has two main uses depending on context. Structure: 不过是 + [noun/adj] (adverb: only/merely) | [Clause A]，不过 [Clause B] (conjunction: but/however). 不过 as an adverb — meaning 'only, merely, nothing more than': softens a statement by reducing its weight. However / but — 不过 as a conjunction introduces a mild contrast or exception, similar to 但是 but softer.

examples.chinese: 他不过是个孩子，不必太严格。
examples.pinyin: Tā bù guò shì gè hái zi，bù bì tài yán gé.
examples.english: He is merely a child — there is no need to be too strict.

examples.chinese: 这幅画很漂亮，不过价格太高了。
examples.pinyin: Zhè fú huà hěn piào liang，bù guò jià gé tài gāo le.
examples.english: This painting is beautiful, but the price is too high.

exercises.question: In '这不过是一幅普通的画', 不过 means:
In '我同意你的观点，不过有一点我想补充', 不过 means:
Which sentence uses 不过 as 'however'?
choices: 这个方法很好，不过需要更多时间来实施。
他不过是个学生，不用那么担心。
不过三个人参加了会议。

exercises.question: Which sentence uses 不过 as 'only/merely'?
choices: 这不过是一种艺术风格，并不代表所有人的审美。
这幅画很美，不过价格太贵了。
计划很好，不过执行起来很难。

exercises.question: Fill in: 抽象画看起来复杂，其实表达的 ____ 是最简单的情感。

mini_exercises.question: 不过 has two main meanings:
mini_exercises.correct: As a conjunction it means 'however' or 'but' (softening a contrast); combined with 是/而已 it means 'merely' or 'only' (downplaying importance)
options: As a conjunction it means 'however' or 'but' (softening a contrast); combined with 是/而已 it means 'merely' or 'only' (downplaying importance)
It always introduces an unexpected result that contradicts expectations
It introduces a definition or explanation of a concept
It is used only as a question word meaning 'how exactly'

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: This painting is quite good; however, the colors are a little monotonous.
mini_exercises.question_chinese: 这幅画画得还不错，___颜色有些单调。
mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 这幅画画得还不错，___颜色有些单调。
mini_exercises.question_english: This painting is quite good; however, the colors are a little monotonous.

mini_exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 不过 to mean 'however'?
mini_exercises.correct: 他很欣赏这幅画，不过觉得线条有些粗糙。
options: 他很欣赏这幅画，不过觉得线条有些粗糙。
他很欣赏这幅画，他觉得不过有些粗糙线条。
他很欣赏，不过这幅画觉得线条有些粗糙。
他不过欣赏这幅画，很觉得线条有些粗糙。
option_pinyin: tā hěn xīn shǎng zhè fú huà bù guò jué de xiàn tiáo yǒu xiē cū cāo
tā hěn xīn shǎng zhè fú huà tā jué de bù guò yǒu xiē cū cāo xiàn tiáo
tā hěn xīn shǎng bù guò zhè fú huà jué de xiàn tiáo yǒu xiē cū cāo
tā bù guò xīn shǎng zhè fú huà hěn jué de xiàn tiáo yǒu xiē cū cāo

culture_notes.title: Chinese Ink Painting: Art in Simplicity
culture_notes.content:
中国水墨画 (Zhōngguó shuǐmò huà), Chinese ink painting, is one of the oldest and most distinguished art forms in the world, dating back over a thousand years. Using only black ink (and sometimes light washes of color) on rice paper, Chinese painters create works of remarkable depth and expressiveness.

The philosophy behind ink painting is deeply influenced by Taoism (道家 Dàojiā) and Zen Buddhism (禅宗 Chánzōng): the idea that emptiness (空白 kòngbái) is as meaningful as what is painted. The unpainted space in an ink painting is not an omission — it is an invitation for the viewer's imagination to complete the scene.

Famous subjects include mountains and rivers (山水 shānshuǐ), bamboo (竹 zhú), plum blossoms (梅花 méihuā), and birds. Each carries symbolic meaning: bamboo represents resilience and integrity; plum blossoms bloom in winter, symbolizing perseverance.

In this way, Chinese ink painting shares a philosophy with abstract art — both invite the viewer to find personal meaning. Both also challenge the idea that beauty must look like reality.

quiz.question: 在于 is used to indicate:
choices: Where the essence or key of something lies

quiz.question: 所谓 can express:
choices: A definition or gentle skepticism about a term

quiz.question: In '这不过是一种风格', 不过 means:
What is the main feature of Chinese ink painting (水墨画)?
choices: Using black ink on rice paper; empty space is meaningful
Using bright colors to depict daily life
Painting on silk with gold ink

quiz.question: Fill in: 美的定义___个人的感受，每个人的标准都不同。

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 但丁，你觉得抽象艺术算不算真正的艺术？
lines.pinyin: Dàn dīng, nǐ jué de chōu xiàng yì shù suàn bú suàn zhēn zhèng de yì shù?
lines.english: Dante, do you think abstract art counts as true art?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我觉得艺术的本质在于表达，而不在于具体的形式是什么。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ jué de yì shù de běn zhì zài yú biǎo dá, ér bú zài yú jù tǐ de xíng shì shì shén me .
lines.english: I think the essence of art lies in expression, it doesn't matter what the specific form is..

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 不过，很多人看不懂抽象画，觉得不过是随意涂鸦而已。
lines.pinyin: Bú guò, hěn duō rén kàn bù dǒng chōu xiàng huà, jué de bú guò shì suí yì tú yā ér yǐ.
lines.english: However, many people can't understand abstract paintings and feel they're only random scribbles.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 所谓的'看不懂'，其实是欣赏方式不同。抽象艺术需要用感受去理解，而不是用眼睛去辨认。
lines.pinyin: Suǒ wèi de 'kàn bù dǒng', qí shí shì xīn shǎng fāng shì bù tóng. Chōu xiàng yì shù xū yào yòng gǎn shòu qù lǐ jiě, ér bú shì yòng yǎn jīng qù biàn rèn.
lines.english: The so-called 'inability to understand' is actually just a different way of appreciating. Abstract art needs to be understood through feeling, not through recognizing what you see.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这倒是。不过我还是更喜欢水墨山水画那种意境。
lines.pinyin: Zhè dào shì. Bú guò wǒ hái shì gèng xǐ huān shuǐ mò shān shuǐ huà nà zhǒng yì jìng.
lines.english: That makes sense. But I still prefer the kind of artistic mood found in ink landscape paintings.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我最近迷上了中国水墨画，觉得它和西方抽象艺术有相通之处。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zuì jìn mí shàng le Zhōng guó shuǐ mò huà, jué de tā hé Xī fāng chōu xiàng yì shù yǒu xiāng tōng zhī chù.
lines.english: I've recently become fascinated with Chinese ink painting — I feel it has something in common with Western abstract art.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 对，水墨画里的空白也是一种表达，这在于画家对'无'的理解。
lines.pinyin: Duì, shuǐ mò huà lǐ de kòng bái yě shì yī zhǒng biǎo dá, zhè zài yú huà jiā duì 'wú' de lǐ jiě.
lines.english: Right, the blank space in ink paintings is also a form of expression — it lies in the painter's understanding of 'emptiness'.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 所谓留白，不过是让观者用自己的想象力去填补空间。
lines.pinyin: Suǒ wèi liú bái, bú guò shì ràng guān zhě yòng zì jǐ de xiǎng xiàng lì qù tián bǔ kōng jiān.
lines.english: The so-called 'leaving space blank' is only inviting the viewer to fill the space with their own imagination.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这和抽象艺术的核心理念真的非常接近 —— 艺术的意义在于每个人的独特解读。
lines.pinyin: Zhè hé chōu xiàng yì shù de hé xīn lǐ niàn zhēn de fēi cháng jiē jìn — yì shù de yì yì zài yú měi gè rén de dú tè jiě dú.
lines.english: This is really very close to the core concept of abstract art — the meaning of art lies in each person's unique interpretation.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 不过，欣赏任何艺术都需要一颗开放的心，这才是最重要的。
lines.pinyin: Bú guò, xīn shǎng rèn hé yì shù dōu xū yào yī kē kāi fàng de xīn, zhè cái shì zuì zhòng yào de.
lines.english: However, appreciating any art requires an open heart — that is the most important thing.
